query:
SELECT id, date, dayType, status, notes FROM dailyPlans WHERE date IN ('2026-05-20','2026-05-21','2026-05-22') ORDER BY date;
SELECT id, planId, sortOrder, title, blockType, durationMin FROM scheduleBlocks WHERE planId IN (SELECT id FROM dailyPlans WHERE date IN ('2026-05-20','2026-05-21','2026-05-22')) ORDER BY planId, sortOrder;

rows.notes: Last day of Indian Hill 2025–26 school year. Mom + Grandma teaching (Sophie's last day was Tue May 19). Plan blocks before this morning.

messages: id	planId	sortOrder	title	blockType	durationMin
